name: campaign_victory
description: Direction A PR 8: campaign victory when day_index > campaign_target_day. Set target=2, food=100 (so workers don't desert mid-campaign), advance 96 in-game hours (4 day rollovers). On day 3 rollover (>target), Lair fires Game.end_game(true). Pass: game_over_eq victory, day_eq 5.
